command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
echo "=== CONFIG workers/primary ==="
cat /home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json

echo "=== FAILURE ARTIFACT ==="
cat /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/jobs/job-20260625T123626Z-725c302a/failure.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "(empty)"

echo "=== REPO FILE COUNTS BY DIR ==="
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
git ls-files | sed "s|/[^/]*$||" | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -20

echo "=== PRIOR JOB METRICS (from contract) ==="
cat /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/jobs/job-20260625T053201Z-78894409/contract.json | python3 -c "
import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin)
pre=d.get("preflight",{})
plan=d.get("plan",{})
pm=pre.get("_metrics",{})
plm=plan.get("_metrics",{})
print("preflight (3060): eval_count=",pm.get("eval_count"),"duration_s=",round(pm.get("total_duration",0)/1e9,1))
print("plan (3090): eval_count=",plm.get("eval_count"),"duration_s=",round(plm.get("total_duration",0)/1e9,1))
print("preflight prompt_eval_count=",pm.get("prompt_eval_count"))
print("plan prompt_eval_count=",plm.get("prompt_eval_count"))
"
' 2>&1
echo DONE_1955
